name: No-Show Re-scheduler Bot
description: Detects missed appointments, auto-sends SMS + email with a one-click reschedule link, follows up 2x before marking as lost.

no_show_detection.method: Calendly webhook or check 15 min after appointment time

client_variables.sms_message_1: Hey {{first_name}}, we missed you for your appointment today with {{company_name}}. No worries! Reschedule here: {{reschedule_link}}
client_variables.sms_message_2: Hi {{first_name}}, just following up on the missed appointment with {{company_name}}. Still interested? Book a new time: {{reschedule_link}}

setup_steps: Set up Calendly/GHL no-show webhook or detection logic
Customize SMS and email templates with client's branding/tone
Build n8n workflow: No-show detected → SMS + Email → Wait → Follow-up → Mark lost
Set up reschedule link that auto-populates contact info
Configure CRM tag updates for tracking
Test with a fake no-show appointment
n8n_workflow_nodes: Twilio - Send SMS #1 with reschedule link
Gmail - Send email #1 with reschedule link
